description_long: This is a small, rectangular cabin with a simple, compact structure and a dark, gable-style roof. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely clad in wood or siding, and the roof is steeply pitched, providing a classic, rustic appearance. The cabin features several small, symmetrically arranged windows on its visible sides, each with a square or rectangular shape, allowing natural light to enter the interior. There is a single door located on one of the longer facades, positioned slightly off-center and adjacent to a set of windows. The building sits directly on a flat surface with no visible foundation or steps, and there is no porch or veranda attached. The overall design is functional and unadorned, evoking a traditional, utilitarian residential structure suitable for rural or suburban settings.
description: A compact, light-colored cabin with a dark gable roof, symmetrical small windows, and a single door on one side. The design is simple and rustic, with no porch or decorative elements.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from an angle showing the front facade with the door and three windows, as well as part of the side wall and roof.
description_view_1: This view shows the side of the cabin with three small windows and the full expanse of the dark gable roof.
description_view_2: The rear and opposite side of the cabin are visible, featuring three windows and the roof's pitch, with no door present.
description_view_3: A direct view of the cabin's side, displaying three windows and the roof, with the door not visible.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a steep pitch, covered in dark shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Three small, rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on each of the longer facades, evenly spaced and aligned horizontally
attribute_door_placement: A single exterior door is located on one of the longer facades, slightly off-center and adjacent to the windows
